name: Senpai.gg
description: AI-powered in‑game assistant (desktop overlay + voice) that provides pre/post‑game analysis, live timers and recommendations for competitive PC gamers.

details.targetMarket: Competitive PC gamers (League of Legends, Valorant, TFT, Wild Rift and similar titles)

items: Windows desktop app with in-game overlay and computer-vision features
Real-time Voice Assistant that gives audio cues and coaching during matches
Pregame recommendations (builds, counters, tier lists) and automatic import of pro builds
Post-game analysis and AI-generated clips/highlights with strength/weakness pointers
Timers and live trackers (e.g., spike timer for Valorant)
Game-specific assistants: jungle assistant, gank alerts, objective/vision indicators, enemy stats
Match history, player profiles and teammate search functionality
SenpAI Plus subscription: ad-free experience, profile badge, Discord role, premium contests and additional features
Tier lists and pro build catalogs, community-shared builds

missingFeatures: No built-in 1:1 human coach marketplace, scheduling, or paid coaching product — platform focuses on AI assistant rather than connecting players to verified coaches
No structured longitudinal progress plans or curriculum with measurable milestones to track improvement over time (beyond per-match feedback)
No public B2B/API offering for teams, esports orgs or third‑party coaches to pull analytics or integrate into coaching workflows
Pricing transparency and standardized plans are hard to find on the official site; regional/reseller listings show divergent prices, which hurts comparison and enterprise packaging
Limited platform reach: primarily a Windows desktop app (desktop/overlay only) with little mobile or console integration for cross‑device coaching

pricingPlans.name: Free
pricingPlans.note: Basic desktop assistant: overlays, basic pre/post-game stats and recommendations.

pricingPlans.name: SenpAI Plus
pricingPlans.note: Premium, ad-free experience with profile badge, Discord role, premium contests and additional in-app perks; exact official price not clearly listed publicly.

pricingEvidence.label: SenpAI Plus page (official)
pricingEvidence.claim: Official site advertises a SenpAI Plus subscription and perks, but does not expose a clear global USD sticker price on the public page.

pricingEvidence.label: Regional reseller listing (example: ByNoGame / epin sites)
pricingEvidence.claim: Third-party resellers list monthly SenpAI Plus packages (e.g., ~30 TRY/month), indicating regionally variable pricing and reseller channels.

companyEvidence.label: Y Combinator company profile
companyEvidence.claim: Lists SenpAI.GG as YC Summer 2021 company, founded 2017, based in Boston and reports a seed raise (~$3M) and team size of ~12.

companyEvidence.label: Crunchbase company profile
companyEvidence.claim: Crunchbase records a seed funding round (ACT Venture Partners) and company overview/funding timeline.

reviewEvidence.label: SenpAI Help Center — Voice Assistant does not work
reviewEvidence.claim: Official support article exists to troubleshoot the Voice Assistant, indicating users commonly encounter setup/compatibility issues.

reviewEvidence.label: Reddit discussion (r/VALORANT) — is senpai.gg allowed?
reviewEvidence.claim: Community threads discuss whether SenpAI's in‑game assistant is allowed by game publishers, showing user concern about ban risk and compliance.

reviewEvidence.label: Scamadviser site check
reviewEvidence.claim: Third‑party site rates senpai.gg as legitimate, which helps surface trust signals for users.

featureEvidence.label: About / product page (features list)
featureEvidence.claim: Official product description lists desktop overlay, voice assistant, live trackers, timers, gank alerts, objective vision and other in-game assist features.

featureEvidence.label: TechCrunch coverage
featureEvidence.claim: TechCrunch describes SenpAI.GG as an AI-powered assistant that provides real-time recommendations and post-game feedback, and notes legal/anti-cheat considerations.

strengths: Real-time voice assistant + computer-vision overlay gives actionable in-match guidance (differentiator vs static stats sites)
Multi-game support with game-specific utilities (timers, jungle assistance, gank/vision alerts)
Backed by YC and early VC seed (ACT Venture Partners) which provides credibility and investor validation
Freemium model lowers adoption friction while allowing upsell to SenpAI Plus premium perks
weaknesses: No integrated human coach marketplace or scheduling/payment flow for verified 1:1 coaching — gap for users who want live instructors
Desktop-only Windows app and overlay model limits reach (no first-class mobile/console experience)
Official pricing transparency is weak; reliance on regional resellers and unclear pricing can hurt monetization and enterprise packaging
User support & reliability issues (voice/pregame failures reported and documented in help center), which reduces trust for competitive users concerned about in‑match stability
